case_title: FORD & SONS INC. VS RAJABI, STEPHANIE DBA UNISOFT INTERNATIONAL

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAJABI, STEPHANIE DBA UNISOFT INTERNATIONAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY FORD & SONS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RAJABI, STEPHANIE DBA UNISOFT INTERNATIONAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD & SONS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAJABI, STEPHANIE DBA UNISOFT INTERNATIONAL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,036.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-26-1993, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-07-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RAJABI, STEPHANIE DBA UNISOFT INTERNATIONAL
